name_cn:
Genuine quality
🌟Classic Lady D Three-Compartment Grey Lambskin
Model 0505
This Lady D bag combines elegance with a modern flair.
Crafted from exquisite lambskin, it features enamel lettering and a detachable shoulder strap.
Elegant and practical, it offers ample space for daily storage.\nLightweight and easy to carry.
A must-have for fashionistas.
Perfect details that rival the real thing, super 5🌟 rating
Size: 17*15*7cm
